creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
Created attachment 174512
upgrades fbalpha from v0.2.97.37 to v0.2.97.38

*  Upgrades fbalpha core from version 0.2.97.37 to 0.2.97.38, which fixes rewinding on pgm game (Ketsui tested) when using fba/fbalpha core
  *  Update path of snes9x-next to new name of snes9x2010 (same checkout version)
